name: rich-select
description: A searchable single/multi select with floating listbox, inline search filter, tag pills for multi-selection, and full WAI-ARIA APG combobox/listbox keyboard navigation; positioned by @floating-ui/dom.
docs: Register <lv-rich-select> by importing components/ui/rich-select.ts from your entry point. Pass `options` as { value, label, description?, disabled? }[]. Set `multiple` for multi-select. `value` is a string (single) or string[] (multi). Listen for `lv-change`.
